name: Nutrient
description: Nutrient — SDK for PDF annotation, digital signatures, form filling, and document editing in web and mobile apps.

seo.title: Nutrient — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Nutrient: Nutrient — SDK for PDF annotation, digital signatures, form filling, and document editing in web and mobile apps.

when_to_use: PDF annotation and digital signature SDK for enterprise apps
Mobile PDF viewer with markup tools for iOS and Android
Document editing and form filling in React or Vue apps
PDF generation and manipulation via server-side Node.js SDK
Replacing PDF.js with a full-featured annotation SDK

pros: Modern rebrand of PSPDFKit — same core tech
Consistent API across web, iOS, Android
Low-code UI widgets for faster integration
cons: Rebranding causes confusion with old PSPDFKit docs
Bundle size still heavy in web apps
Smaller OSS alternative crowd gaining ground
review.verdict: PSPDFKit with fresh AI paint — still best-in-class PDF SDK, still priced for enterprise buyers.
review.best_for: Product teams needing high-fidelity PDF editing plus new AI extraction features.
review.not_for: Price-sensitive teams — pdf.js, PDFShift, or OSS forks cover basics.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
